title: artemisia obtusiloba subsp. subviscosa
intro: Artemisia obtusiloba subsp. subviscosa is a subspecies of the wormwood plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a useful treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Artemisia obtusiloba subsp. subviscosa include relief from fever, colds, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
